sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Na seem un, na seem un, Pasian' sawltak hi hang
I Topa totsa lampi mah a zui hi hang.
Ama thu nuam in ei hong thahat sak ding hi.
Na sep ding i muh peuh thahatna tawh seem ni.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Na seem un, na seem un.
Na seem un, na seem un.
Lamen un, Thungen un,
Topa hong nai mateng seem un.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Na seem un, na seem un, gilkialte an vaak un.
Nuntakna tuinak ah mi gimte paipih un.
Singlamteh le lungdamna thu tawh kipaak ni.
Tangko un, "Man ngen lo, a khawnkhong hong hon hi".

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Na seem un, na seem un, om hi mikim sep ding,
Theihkhialhna khuamial gam hi eite sukmang ding.
I Topa Pasian' min i pahtawi ding a hi,
Tangko un, "Man ngen lo, a khawnkhong hong hon hl.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Na seem un, na seem un, Topa' tha tawh seem amigo
Kumpi puan le lukhu nuamna eite'n saang ding,
Tatkhiatsa mi dikte tawh eite'n i vekpi'n,
Sakhawm ding, "Man ngen lo, a khawnkhong hong hon hi”.
